title: Olive Oasis
description: A floral, dense, cozy jamaican dish featuring olives that are air-fried for a halal-friendly snack.

ingredients.name: olives
ingredients.notes: Use extra virgin olive oil for healthier cooking.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: For coating the olives and tortillas.

ingredients.name: cooking spray or oil for air frying
ingredients.notes: Ensure cooking at a safe temperature (350°F). Use only halal certified oils if necessary.

instructions: In a bowl, mix the pitted and chopped olives with 1 tablespoon of flour. Toss until well coated.
Roll each tortilla in a thin layer of flour (about 2 tablespoons total for all). Coat both sides evenly and place them in the air fryer basket.
Fry the olive-coated tortillas on medium heat for about 3-5 minutes, flipping halfway through. Check frequently to avoid burning.
Drain excess oil from the olives before serving if preferred. Optionally add a bit of lemon zest or another aromatic herb for extra flavor.
Serve hot and enjoy your floral, dense, cozy jamaican dish as a perfect halal-friendly snack.
